context_notes: Repo truth after this session: V2 Loop 1 and Loop 2 were already in place at 543ed8b. A later session added the remaining roadmap docs and implemented V2 Loop 3 with a trusted execution adapter stub. Another session completed V2 Loop 4 by binding capabilities to approval-time request/action/target context, requiring execute-time action and target, failing closed on missing capability context, clearing denied/consumed capability state, adding masked approval payloads, and updating docs. This session completed V2 Loop 5 by adding a local node-to-node harness in `src/lib.rs`, a helper process binary in `src/bin/e2e-node.rs`, a wrapper script in `scripts/run-e2e-harness.sh`, CI gating in `.github/workflows/ci.yml`, and docs that say the local harness now backs the stubbed V2 process-boundary claim while still not claiming real host certification. The worktree remains intentionally dirty with the verified Loop 4 and Loop 5 changes listed in uncommitted_files. The clean continuation path is V2 Loop 6 only.
